item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I really really enjoyed this (although I didn’t understand it all..)

+1 and I’m off to look at the cross links!

(Ok now I get it)

EDIT: having read all of In Memoriam in order, I have a much greater appreciation for what you’re doing here. This is an ambitious project, and it makes me excited.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Mānsatt'āppaṁ Kunna Kalākāran1 is loosely based on Malayalam/Proto-Dravidian. I'm not a linguistic scholar, so I kinda played fast and loose with the specifics of the etymology.

In my headcanon, Kalākāran escaped the Fall of Adytum and fled south into the subcontinent. He hung out there for a while, then decided to head into Europe during the early part of the colonial period. I initially considered giving him a purely Adytite name and just making something up, but since he spent over a thousand years in India, it felt right giving him a Dravidian name.

I liked the sound of those words (horribly mispronounced, I'm sure), so I went with that.

Footnotes
1. Something like "The Artist that Works With/In Flesh"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What's the etymology for Lucien's real name?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Love the RH Commission reference! Surprised it’s not a tag or an entry on the GOI page yet.

Excellent dialogue, imagery, and a fun read! +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's almost scary how quickly you're producing top quality articles cybersqyd. Can't wait for the next one!+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Unique and interesting. Aquatic SCPs are my jam. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Fun imagery, fun story, a fun read +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
hi i'm responsible for… uh… making it weirdly historical. 'cause i have a thing about sailing ships.

also, sarkics.

This piece, while standalone, fits into a slow-moving and much larger Sarkic narrative. There is one giant hint in this for what's to come.

the horns have been blown and the horsemen ride

Thank you very much to cybersqyd for anchoring my wilder tendencies. I am a fan of adding a lot of extra shit, and ve kept me on target. Thank you.

cyber sqyd is best sqyd.

+ Attribution
– hide block

Author: Carlo Raso
Release year: 2018

Source: pixabay

Title: paperbackground.jpg
Author: MissMary
Release year: 2016

item.title: Author's Comment
item.content:encoded:
hi i'm responsible for the sins in this

Fun little things:

  • The Kirck and Konlef are named after gay ships (kirk/spock and kondraki/clef)
  • The phrase 'dank antimemes' was in this in the second interview but it got cut :(

I don't really have much else to say here except thanks to Malyce for putting up with my shit while writing this.
